name: Advanced patterns (React)
description: LOW: specialized patterns like useEffectEvent dependency handling, stable subscriptions, and initialize-once guards.

metadata.intent: Apply advanced React patterns safely (stable subscriptions, one-time init, effect events)

must_use: Avoid effect churn from handler identity changes
must_not: Put effect events in dependency arrays
conventions: Prefer simple patterns; use these only when needed.

steps.description: Do not include `useEffectEvent` results in effect deps; depend on reactive values (like `roomId`) and call the event inside the effect.
Don’t run app-wide init in component effects without a module-level guard; components can remount and re-run effects.
Keep event subscriptions stable; store latest handler via `useEffectEvent` or ref pattern instead of resubscribing on every render.
